contract.name: CollateralXProtocolManager
contract.desc:
Protocol/vault manager.

Safety-critical assumption: this contract owns the protocol's canonical vault
boxes, while the stablecoin controller owns ASA reserve movement. Minting is
only requested by this app after vault health, caps, and oracle freshness pass.

methods.name: createApplication
methods.desc:
Sets the immutable bootstrap admin at application creation.
Protocol params are initialized separately so deployers can fund the app
account for boxes before vault creation starts.

methods.name: initializeProtocol
methods.desc: One-time protocol initialization. Only the bootstrap admin can call this.

methods.name: createVault
methods.desc:
Creates an empty vault owned by the sender and returns its deterministic id.
The caller must include box refs and the app account must already have MBR.

methods.name: readVault
methods.desc: Read a vault record by deterministic id. Requires the vault box ref.

methods.name: vaultExists
methods.desc: True when the vault box exists. Useful for frontends and keepers.

methods.name: readMaxMintable
methods.desc:
Returns the currently mintable amount for a vault after applying collateral,
per-vault, protocol debt, and stablecoin supply ceilings. Requires vault box,
oracle app, and stablecoin controller app resources.

methods.name: readProtocolStatus
methods.desc: Returns protocol-wide counters, pause flags, and integration ids.

methods.name: adminSetParams
methods.desc: Admin-only full parameter update. Future governance can wrap this call.

methods.name: adminSetIntegrations
methods.desc: Admin-only integration pointer update for replaceable modules.

methods.name: adminSetPauseFlags
methods.desc: Admin-only replacement of the pause bitmask.

methods.name: adminTransfer
methods.desc: Admin transfer is explicit and logged for governance/indexers.

methods.name: depositCollateral
methods.desc:
Deposits ALGO collateral into a vault.

Required group shape:
- tx 0: payment from vault owner to this app address
- tx 1: this app call with the payment transaction argument

methods.name: mintStablecoin
methods.desc:
Mints stablecoin to the vault owner through the stablecoin controller.

This call must be a single outer transaction. It performs a protocol-gated
inner app call to the stablecoin controller, which then transfers ASA units
from its reserve account to the vault owner.

methods.name: repay
methods.desc:
Repays stablecoin debt.

Required group shape:
- tx 0: stablecoin ASA transfer from vault owner to stablecoin controller
- tx 1: this app call with the asset-transfer transaction argument

methods.name: withdrawCollateral
methods.desc:
Withdraws ALGO collateral. If this drains a debt-free vault, the vault and
owner index boxes are deleted after aggregate accounting is updated.

methods.name: closeVault
methods.desc:
Closes a debt-free vault, returns all remaining collateral, and deletes the
vault and owner-index boxes.

methods.name: liquidate
methods.desc: Liquidation entry point reserved for keeper/executor integration.
